evals.prompt: Write a 3-email welcome sequence for new subscribers to our fitness app
evals.expected_output: Three complete emails with subject lines, preview text, body copy, CTAs, and send timing in the active brand voice

assertions.text: All 3 emails have subject lines, preview text, body copy, and clear CTAs
Email sequence follows a logical progression (welcome → value → action)
Send timing recommendations are included (delay between emails)
Content is personalized with merge tag placeholders where appropriate

evals.prompt: Create Google Ads copy for our organic skincare line — 3 responsive search ads targeting 'natural face cream'
evals.expected_output: Three RSA ad groups with multiple headlines, descriptions, and extensions following Google Ads best practices

assertions.text: Each RSA includes 10-15 headlines (max 30 chars each) and 3-4 descriptions (max 90 chars each)
Headlines include the target keyword 'natural face cream' in at least 3 variations
Ad extensions (sitelinks, callouts, structured snippets) are recommended
No superlative claims without substantiation (compliant with brand guardian rules)

evals.prompt: Draft a LinkedIn thought leadership post about the future of remote work for our HR tech brand
evals.expected_output: A LinkedIn post optimized for the platform's algorithm with hook, value, and CTA structure

assertions.text: Post length is appropriate for LinkedIn (1200-1500 characters or 150-200 words for high engagement)
Hashtag recommendations are included (3-5 relevant hashtags)
